title: eriogonum wootonii
intro: Eriogonum wootonii, also known as Wooton's buckwheat or Wooton's desert buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Eriogonum wootonii include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable plant for treating various health issues. Eriogonum wootonii can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in salves and poultices to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
